SONG CREDITS¬©

Song: Tera Hone Laga Hoon

Movie: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
Starring: Ranbir Kapoor, Katrina Kaif

Thinking about the love we're making
And the life we're living in

id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng ūüíĖ‚ú®

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. ūüíę

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. ūüé∂

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.

Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

A Mumbai Film Company Production

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk ūüßü‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards ūüĎĽ

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister‚Äôs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos‚ÄĒuntil he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace‚Äôs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.‚Äā‚Äā

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don‚Äôt, it‚Äôs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Bangles (Official¬†#Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§óŗ§°ŗ•Ä
snippet.description:
|| ūüēČ || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod

snippet.title: Bluesss & Friends - Yabi The Goat / Hidney Manchhe Ladchha / Episode 3
snippet.description:
Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.


Episode 003

‚ÄúHidney Maanchhe Ladchha‚ÄĚ is a Nepali idiom that simply means ‚Äúa person who walks, falls", signifying that failure is a natural part of the journey towards success. YABI immediately contrasts this idea, emphasizing that while falling is inevitable, he is bound to get back up and keep racing towards his dreams. Like the idiom, he didn‚Äôt just walk- he ran through the pitfalls his mom warned him about and these obstacles have shaped his journey and helped him to get to where he is now, ‚Äúcarrying the industry on his shoulders‚ÄĚ.

Follow all of Bluesss and Friends Releases Here: https://bluesssandfriends.com

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
‚Ź¨ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ

‚ö°ÔłŹ Banjaare:
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare

‚ö°ÔłŹ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

ūüď∑ Photo:
https://unsplash.com

ūüöę If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can‚Äôt lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla

Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De‚Ä¶
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De‚Ä¶

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

snippet.title: "Malai Hera" Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh
snippet.description:
‚ÄúMalai Hera‚ÄĚ is a gentle love song where a single glance holds a thousand unspoken feelings and hearts speak in silence.

Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh are:

Sabin Rai 
Binod Lama Tamang
Jeevan Lama
John Shrestha

Audio engineers
Stephen Tamang
Subash Gurung

Crew 
Jitesh Shakya
Nara Bahadur Khatri
Samir Shrestha

Mix and Master by Stephen tamang
Recording Studio : Fuzz_studio_nepal.
Keyboard sessions: Anup sunar ( Rahar music Creations )
Back vocals : Anup sunara, Aashis Rokka.

Video credit :
A FILM BY CHINOE TALES PRODUCTION
VIDEO DIRECTOR : ABHI SAMPANG RAI
CAST: NEELAM RAI. AKASH SUHANG LIMBU. AAYUS RAI
DOP: BIKESH MAGAR. ASSIST DIR: ARSHU SHRESTHA. CINEMATOGRAPHY: KIWA KHIMDUNG RAI.
ART DIRECTION: ONGDI MOKTAN. MUA/STYLIST: BOMI RAI. SAMASTI RAI. PROJECT MANAGER: AADI PAHARI.
PRODUCTION MANAGER: RUSHAL SHRESTHA. ASSIST PROD. MANAGER: ASBIN RAI & ARBIN URANW
EDIT: BIKESH MAGAR. SANTOSH SHAH THAKURI. coLor: BIKESH MAGAR.
SPECIAL THANKS: KAAGAZ PRODUCTION.

snippet.title: Anuv Jain - HUSN (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
ūüĎĎ Anuv Jain - HUSN (Lyrics)
ūüĒ• Help us reach 50,000 subscribers!
ūüĒĒ Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

ūüéß Stream & Download: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqblNsNnUtZU5GdmtNV25pRFZ0TGl1emxkWG1Cd3xBQ3Jtc0tsYV9IMXFRZWh4Q0hQeHprR3NYRVFKU3pHcjF4TU5iWHZnLTl0bmRQMUx6SUd0SzdwUFp1RU9HSG02MVZNVkNQY3dlbkIxdlNxWUFzb0V3M0J5a0c5cmRZWXlkMlRPQlNkNFRtWGxRN2hodXVZaEhtVQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fanuvjain.lnk.to%2FHusn&v=0IIJxkDtkHY

‚ú® Follow Anuv Jain:


√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó  

Lyrics for "Anuv Jain - HUSN"

Dekho Dekho
Kaisi baatein yahan ki
Hain saath par
Hain saath na bhi
Kya itni aasaan hain?

Dekho Dekho 
Jaise mere iraaday
Waise kahaan 
Tere yahan the
Haan kitni naadan main

Mere husn ke ilawa
Kabhi dil bhi maang lo na
Haye pal mein 
Main pighal jaun haan 

Ab aisa na karo
Ke dil judna paye wapis
Teri baaton
Se bikhar jaun haan

Mana zamana hai deewana
Isilye tune na jana 
Tere liye main 
Kaafi hoon 

Dekho Dekho 
Yeh zamane se thak kar 
Atey ho kyun masoom ban kar?
Tere liye main 
Kya hi hoon?

Phir aatey kyun yahan
Karne aankhon mein 
Ho baarish?
Ab aye 
Toh theher jao na

Aur poocho na zara 
Mere din ke bare mein bhi
Bas itne mein 
Sambhal jaun haan 

Haan ek din 
Kabhi koi 
Jab bhi padhe 
Kahani teri

Lagta mujhe
Mere naam ka 
Zikr kahin 
Bhi hoga nahin

Haan 
Main yahin 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho yeh dil ka haal kya 
Hothon se hota na bayan 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Kaisa naseeb hai mera
Milke bhi na mujhe mila 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Teri adhuri si wafa 
Maangu main maangu aur na 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho Dekho
Kaisi kheenchi lakeerein
Chahe bhi dil toh bhi na jeete
Main iss daud mein nahin

Dekho Dekho 
Kaisi baatein yahan ki 
Baatein yahi dekhoon jahan bhi 
Main is daur se nahin

√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó

ūüŹ∑ÔłŹTags
#husn #anuvjain #loksangeet #hindi #husnlyrics

ūüďß Contact/Submission: loksangeetwork@gmail.com

Kahani teri

Lagta mujhe
Mere naam ka 
Zikr kahin 
Bhi hoga nahin

Haan 
Main yahin 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho yeh dil ka haal kya 
Hothon se hota na bayan 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Kaisa naseeb hai mera
Milke bhi na mujhe mila 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Teri adhuri si wafa 
Maangu main maangu aur na 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho Dekho
Kaisi kheenchi lakeerein
Chahe bhi dil toh bhi na jeete
Main iss daud mein nahin

Dekho Dekho 
Kaisi baatein yahan ki 
Baatein yahi dekhoon jahan bhi 
Main is daur se nahin

√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, cre√ęren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen ‚Äď of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

ŗīÖŗī§ŗĶć ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī®ŗīĺŗīĶŗīŅŗīóŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗīĶŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīÖŗīāŗī¨ŗīįŗīöŗĶĀŗīāŗī¨ŗīŅ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīĻŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīŅŗīēŗĶčŗī™ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī≠ŗĶÄŗīģŗĶĽ ŗī™ŗīŅŗĶĽŗī¨ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīģŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶÄŗĶĽ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīģŗĶĺŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶľ "ŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī™ŗĶćŗīöŗĶľ ŗī¶ŗīŅ ŗīęŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺŗīóŗĶć" ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīā ŗīÖŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīģŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶáŗī§ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā, ŗīáŗī§ŗĶĀŗīĶŗīįŗĶÜ ŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗī™ŗĶćŗī®ŗīā ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīłŗĶÉŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗīŅ. ŗīĶŗĶÜŗĶľŗīöŗĶćŗīĶŗĶĹ ŗī≠ŗĶāŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīą ŗīÜŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮ ŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶčŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĮŗīĺŗī§ŗĶäŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīöŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīģŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗī™ŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīįŗīłŗīēŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗĶćŗīĮŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā, ROBLOX ŗīÖŗīāŗīóŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīłŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅ ŗī¨ŗīĺŗī°ŗĶćŗīúŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ROBLOX ŗī°ŗĶčŗī≥ŗīĪŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ("Robux") ŗī®ŗĶáŗīüŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā. ŗīÖŗī§ŗīĺŗīēŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÜ, ŗīÖŗīĶŗī§ŗīĺŗĶľ ŗīĶŗīłŗĶćŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗī®ŗĶĀŗī¨ŗī®ŗĶćŗīß ŗīČŗī™ŗīēŗīįŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīďŗĶļŗī≤ŗĶąŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī≤ŗĶčŗīóŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗīā ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī£ ŗīłŗīĺŗīģŗīóŗĶćŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶĺ, ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗĶáŗī¶ŗī®ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīģŗīē ŗīėŗīüŗīēŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗī® ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗīŅŗīßŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīŅŗīĶ ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā.

snippet.title: ROBLOX DON'T DIE FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today I had to try NOT to DIE For Brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 ūüŹĻ

[Verse 1]
Touch my body tender
'Cause the feeling makes me weak
Kicking off the covers
I see the ceiling while you're looking down at me

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed?
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Verse 2]
It was last December
You were layin' on my chest
I still remember
I was scared to take a breath
Didn't want you to mov–Ķ your head

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being fri–Ķnds
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Bridge]
The devil in your eyes
Won't deny the lies you've sold
I'm holding on too tight
While you let go
This is casual

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Outro]
I'm someone you've never met (Yeah)

ūüéß [LYRICS]:
Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

Yeah...
I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hoping you'll find someone else
Cause yeah, we still young there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it off this bed
I hope I go to heaven, so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

I'm happy that you're here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos while walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sang me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays went to church, on Mondays watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me
